title: Bloomberg Security
description: A financial security as represented in the Bloomberg BLPAPI data universe. Bloomberg tracks over 35 million instruments across equities, fixed income, derivatives, commodities, currencies, and alternative assets through services including //blp/refdata, //blp/mktdata, and //blp/mktbar. Securities are identified using Bloomberg tickers, FIGI, ISIN, CUSIP, SEDOL, and Bloomberg Unique Identifiers (BBUID). Based on bloomberg.github.io/blpapi-docs.

bbuid.description: Bloomberg Unique Identifier (BBUID) - the primary internal Bloomberg security identifier.

figi.description: Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) assigned by Bloomberg as the open, standard global identifier.

ticker.description: Bloomberg ticker symbol including asset class suffix used in BLPAPI requests (e.g., AAPL US Equity, CL1 Comdty, SPX Index, JPY Curncy).

isin.description: International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for cross-border security identification.

cusip.description: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) identifier, used primarily for US and Canadian securities.

sedol.description: Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) identifier. BLPAPI supports symbology lookup via /sedol1/ prefix (e.g., /sedol1/2840215).

name.description: Full legal name of the security or issuer (BLPAPI field: Security_Name or NAME).

shortName.description: Abbreviated name of the security as displayed on Bloomberg Terminal (BLPAPI field: SHORT_NAME).

longCompanyName.description: Extended company or instrument description (BLPAPI field: LONG_COMP_NAME).

securityDescription.description: Bloomberg security description providing concise instrument details (BLPAPI field: SECURITY_DES).

securityType.description: Bloomberg security type classification determining which market data fields and services are available.

exchange.description: Primary exchange where the security is listed, using Bloomberg exchange codes (BLPAPI field: EXCH_CODE).

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the security's primary trading currency (BLPAPI field: CRNCY).

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the security's country of domicile (BLPAPI field: COUNTRY_ISO).

sector.description: GICS sector classification for the security (BLPAPI field: GICS_SECTOR_NAME).

industryGroup.description: GICS industry group classification (BLPAPI field: GICS_INDUSTRY_GROUP_NAME).

industry.description: Bloomberg Industry Classification Standard (BICS) industry code (BLPAPI field: INDUSTRY_GROUP).

marketCap.description: Market capitalization in the security's primary trading currency (BLPAPI field: MARKET_CAP or CUR_MKT_CAP).

sharesOutstanding.description: Total number of shares currently outstanding (BLPAPI field: EQY_SH_OUT).

creditRatings.description: Credit ratings from major rating agencies as reported via Bloomberg (BLPAPI fields: RTG_MOODY, RTG_SP, RTG_FITCH).

active.description: Whether the security is currently active and trading on its primary exchange.

PricingSnapshot.description: Current and recent pricing data for a Bloomberg security, corresponding to fields available via the //blp/mktdata subscription service and //blp/refdata ReferenceDataRequest.

lastPrice.description: Most recent trade price (BLPAPI field: PX_LAST or LAST_PRICE for subscriptions).

bidPrice.description: Current best bid price (BLPAPI field: PX_BID for requests, BID for subscriptions).

askPrice.description: Current best ask price (BLPAPI field: PX_ASK for requests, ASK for subscriptions).

midPrice.description: Mid-point of the last bid and last offer (BLPAPI field: PX_MID).

openPrice.description: Opening price for the current trading session (BLPAPI field: PX_OPEN or OPEN for subscriptions).

highPrice.description: Intraday high price for the current session (BLPAPI field: PX_HIGH or HIGH for subscriptions).

lowPrice.description: Intraday low price for the current session (BLPAPI field: PX_LOW or LOW for subscriptions).

volume.description: Total trading volume for the current session (BLPAPI field: VOLUME).

vwap.description: Volume-weighted average price for the current session (BLPAPI field: EQY_WEIGHTED_AVG_PX, available via //blp/mktvwap).

previousClose.description: Previous trading session close price (BLPAPI field: PX_LAST for prior session).

priceChange.description: Absolute price change from previous close (BLPAPI field: NET_CHG).

priceChangePct.description: Percentage price change from previous close (BLPAPI field: CHG_PCT_1D).

fiftyTwoWeekHigh.description: Highest price over the trailing 52-week period (BLPAPI field: HIGH_52WEEK).

fiftyTwoWeekLow.description: Lowest price over the trailing 52-week period (BLPAPI field: LOW_52WEEK).

asOf.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when pricing data was last updated.

Fundamentals.description: Key fundamental financial data available via BLPAPI ReferenceDataRequest.

earningsPerShare.description: Annualized earnings per share (BLPAPI field: EPS_ANNUALIZED or IS_EPS).

returnOnEquity.description: Return on equity as a percentage (BLPAPI field: RETURN_COM_EQY).

debtToEquity.description: Total debt to common equity ratio (BLPAPI field: TOT_DEBT_TO_COM_EQY).

dividendYield.description: Indicated dividend yield as a percentage (BLPAPI field: EQY_DVD_YLD_IND).

beta.description: Beta relative to the benchmark index (BLPAPI field: BETA_RAW_OVERRIDABLE).

fiscalYearEnd.description: Most recent fiscal year end date.

ReferenceData.description: Descriptive and reference data for a Bloomberg security, retrieved via //blp/refdata ReferenceDataRequest.

businessDescription.description: Business description of the issuing company (BLPAPI field: CIE_DES_BULK or BUSINESS_DESCRIPTION).

numberOfEmployees.description: Total number of employees reported by the company (BLPAPI field: NUM_OF_EMPLOYEES).

yearFounded.description: Year the company was founded (BLPAPI field: YEAR_FOUNDED).

headquarters.description: City and country where the company is headquartered.

ceo.description: Name of the Chief Executive Officer.

bloombergIndustryGroup.description: Bloomberg Industry Classification Standard (BICS) industry group.

companyAddress.description: Company address lines returned as a bulk field (BLPAPI bulk field: COMPANY_ADDRESS).

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) of the issuing entity.

EsgScores.description: Bloomberg ESG scores for the security's issuer, available through Bloomberg Data License and BLPAPI reference data.

overallScore.description: Overall Bloomberg ESG score on a 0-100 scale.

environmentalScore.description: Environmental pillar score on a 0-100 scale.

socialScore.description: Social pillar score on a 0-100 scale.

governanceScore.description: Governance pillar score on a 0-100 scale.

disclosureScore.description: ESG disclosure quality score reflecting completeness of reported data.

asOfDate.description: Date for which the ESG scores are reported.

CreditRating.description: A credit rating issued by a major rating agency for the security, as reported via BLPAPI reference data fields.

agency.description: Name of the credit rating agency.

rating.description: Credit rating symbol (e.g., AAA, Aaa, BB+). BLPAPI fields: RTG_MOODY, RTG_SP, RTG_FITCH.

outlook.description: Rating outlook indicating potential direction of future rating changes.

ratedAt.description: Date the credit rating was assigned or most recently affirmed.

DividendData.description: Dividend information for the security, available via BLPAPI reference data.

indicatedAnnualDividend.description: Indicated annual dividend amount per share (BLPAPI field: EQY_DVD_YLD_IND).

dividendFrequency.description: Frequency of dividend payments (BLPAPI field: DVD_FREQ).

exDividendDate.description: Next or most recent ex-dividend date (BLPAPI field: DVD_EX_DT).

dividendPayDate.description: Next or most recent dividend payment date (BLPAPI field: DVD_PAY_DT).

dividendAmount.description: Most recent dividend amount per share (BLPAPI field: DVD_SH_LAST).
